description: Visit three specific websites through Tor Browser and document them for a case file. Save https://check.torproject.org/ as /home/ga/Documents/CaseEvidence/evidence_01_tor_check.pdf, https://www.torproject.org/about/history/ as /home/ga/Documents/CaseEvidence/evidence_02_tor_history.pdf, and https://metrics.torproject.org/ as /home/ga/Documents/CaseEvidence/evidence_03_tor_metrics.pdf. Create a structured plain-text evidence log at /home/ga/Documents/CaseEvidence/evidence_log.txt containing the full URL, the exact PDF filename, and a brief one-line description for each of the three visited pages.
